name: Joey DeFrancesco
abstract: Joey DeFrancesco (April 10, 1971 – August 25, 2022) was an American jazz organist, trumpeter, saxophonist, and occasional singer. He released more than 30 albums under his own name and recorded extensively as a sideman with such leading jazz musicians as trumpeter Miles Davis, saxophonist Houston Person, and guitarist John McLaughlin.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Jazzmobile Salute to Dr. George Butler

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Ascione
about_quotes.evidence: I come up with fairly, borderline catchy to corny, but stuff I’ve written like this record I did with Joey DeFrancesco and Vignola, a Goodfellows record
